cursor-com-docs.description: Cursor is an AI editor and coding agent. Use it to understand your codebase, plan and build features, fix bugs, review changes, and work with the tools you already use.

subsections.heading: What you can do with Cursor

cursor-com-docs.title: Cursor Documentation
